forbidden_scope: Harbor runtime/evidence refs and live fact matching
result envelope/failure reason output beyond existing Run Record failure fields
Harbor, Lode, App, or other repository changes

integration_evidence.summary: Read Lode main package facts for sites/example/read-public-page, registry/local-packages.json, package-lock.json, resource-requirements.json, core-consumption fixture, failure mapping, and write-deferred guardrail.

Validates requested Lode package ref, lock presence, capability id/version, read-only operation mode, resource requirement refs, Harbor-owned fact declarations, forbidden fields, and fail-closed failure mapping.
Requires Lode admission before accepted Run Record creation and creates failed Run Records for trusted Task Intent with invalid Lode package/resource contracts.
Adds optional admission.resource_requirement_refs so Core records the Lode resource requirement refs consumed at admission.
Aligns the read-only submit fixture to Lode read-public-page package refs and example.read-public-page.resources.
Validates accepted Lode admission, private-field rejection without Run Record, invalid Lode contract failure with failed Run Record, and non-read operation fail-closed behavior.
Maps GH-103 as the primary Work Item and GH-95 as parent FR evidence without claiming FR completion.

suite_path_consumption.rationale: Narrow Core runtime PR that adds static Lode ref/resource admission checks and self-check/conformance coverage without live runtime matching, result projection, query APIs, generated clients, storage backends, or cross-repo edits.
suite_path_consumption.consumer_boundary: Review and PR Ready consume Lode source facts, the Core lode-admission helper, Run Record admission schema, aligned fixtures, core/conformance self-check output, GH-103 carrier, local build/typecheck/test/lint/conformance output, PR metadata readback, and hosted checks.
suite_path_consumption.recheck_condition: Upgrade to broader suite artifacts when Harbor live facts, API submit/query routes, result envelope projection, evidence retrieval, generated types, CLI/MCP/SDK/App integration, database storage, hosted service storage, or true-write guardrails are added.
